channel.title: Home & Kitchen on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Home & Kitchen on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO 31208 Art Hokusai – The Great Wave 3D Japanese Wall Art Craft Kit Framed Ocean Canvas Creative Activity Gifts for Adults DIY Home Office Decor
item.description: You can find LEGO 31208 Art Hokusai – The Great Wave 3D Japanese Wall Art Craft Kit Framed Ocean Canvas Creative Activity Gifts for Adults DIY Home Office Decor with a discount here: ℹ️: Relax while building this LEGO wall Art set - scan the QR code to listen to the tailor-made soundtrack end enjoy a rewarding mindful experience Number of Pieces: 1,810 The 3D Japanese artwork makes a great home or office décor display piece, and a brilliant present for art and home design fans This home decor craft kit for adults contains 1,810 pieces, 6 canvas bases, 2 hangers elements and a decorative tile with Hokusais signature Celebrate icons from the worlds of art, music and cinema with LEGO Art, crafts and creative activity kits for adults, and indulge in your hobbies This tribute to Hokusai’s The Great Wave comes with a premium booklet with art details and instructions to guide you through the building process Bring one of the most iconic artworks of the last two centuries to life with the LEGO Art Hokusai - The Great Wave set, a DIY framed wall art piece 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO 10313 Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set Artificial Flowers with Poppies and Lavender Crafts for Adults Home Décor Gifts for Women Men Her & Him Botanical Collection
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 10313 Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set Artificial Flowers with Poppies and Lavender Crafts for Adults Home Décor Gifts for Women Men Her & Him Botanical Collection here: ℹ️: The wonderful artificial flowers will never wilt or need to be watered! Display in your own vase with pride as a stunning piece of home decor Number of Pieces: 939 Part of the LEGO Botanical Collection, this set includes elements made of plant-based plastic, produced from sustainably sourced sugar cane Budding flower arrangers can tailor the height of the flowers and experiment with different arrangements to make their own unique display Features 16 stems with a mix of flowers: cornflower, lavender, Welsh poppies, cow parsley, leatherleaf ferns, gerbera daisies, larkspur and lupins Put a creative spin on a timeless gesture with this LEGO flowers set, perfect as surprise gift for a loved one, anniversary present for wife or husband, or a nice housewarming present Let your creativity blossom with the vibrant LEGO Icons Wildflower Bouquet set, which features 8 different stunning species of flowers to build 🛒 Buy it now!
